bitcoin.label: SherpaCarta on-chain treasury
bitcoin.policy: Voluntary donations only. No VC, no ads, no government grants. Balance and txs are public on-chain.

lightning.note: Not live. Do not send. Cam must publish LNURL-pay or Lightning Address when wallet is ready.

silentPayments.note: BIP-352 Silent Payments optional later for stronger donor privacy. Requires SP-capable wallet.

nostr.note: NIP-05 is verified on giveabit.io (parent), not on sherpacarta.org. Browser NIP-07 sign-in is client-side only.

transparency.audit: Not an audited financial statement — on-chain proof anyone can verify.
